name: Art Deco Loft
description: Stunning Art Deco-inspired loft nestled in the jungle near Tulum's pristine beaches. Features open-concept living, rooftop terrace, and modern amenities surrounded by ancient Mayan culture.

name: Beachfront Paradise
description: Luxurious beachfront property with panoramic Caribbean views. Direct beach access, infinity pool, and premium finishes throughout. Perfect for vacation rentals or permanent residence.

name: Jungle Cabin
description: Charming A-frame bungalow with ocean breezes and tropical gardens. Modern design meets coastal living with spacious deck, outdoor shower, and walking distance to beaches and Fifth Avenue.

name: Hillside Villa
description: Architectural masterpiece perched on the hills of Puerto Vallarta. Floor-to-ceiling windows, panoramic bay views, and resort-style amenities. A true sanctuary of luxury and privacy.
